faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Union, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Union residents most commonly deal with pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in Union's many older homes. Our technicians identify the specific species to ensure the most effective treatment.
